steps: Go to https://www.infobip.com/signup and create a free account (or log in at https://portal.infobip.com)
After logging in, note your personal base URL shown on the dashboard (e.g., xxxxx.api.infobip.com) — this is required for all API calls
In the left sidebar, navigate to 'Developer Tools' → 'API Keys'
Enter a name for the key and select the required API scopes (e.g., SMS, WhatsApp, Email)
Click 'Create' and copy the generated API key

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Infobip API key, sent using the 'App' prefix in the Authorization header (e.g., Authorization: App <key>)

notes: Infobip uses a custom 'App' authorization prefix (not 'Bearer') — the Authorization header must be: 'App <api_key>'
Each account has a unique personal base URL (e.g., xxxxx.api.infobip.com) — use this URL, not api.infobip.com, for actual API calls
A free account is available with limited credits for testing SMS, WhatsApp, and Email
API keys can be scoped to specific channels (SMS, WhatsApp, Email, etc.) for security
An API key is automatically assigned when you create your account and can be found under Developer Tools
WhatsApp Business account approval from Meta is required before sending WhatsApp messages

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve SMS message logs to verify the API key (returns empty list if no messages sent yet)
